tooling_sandboxing.detail: The former CodeInterpreterTool ran Python in an isolated Docker container by default but has been removed from crewai-tools in favor of delegating code execution to external sandbox services (E2B, Modal); other tools run directly on the host.

context_memory.detail: A unified Memory class persists across sessions using LanceDB vector storage by default, retrieving via composite scoring of semantic similarity, recency decay, and LLM-assigned importance.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: Task guardrails reject/transform task output with automatic retries and before/after_kickoff callbacks modify crew-level inputs/outputs - observation and post-hoc transformation, without per-tool-call pre-execution blocking.

prompt_optimization.detail: Agents are customized via role/goal/backstory plus optional system_template/prompt_template/response_template overrides, with no automatic prompt tuning or eval-driven search documented.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: The pip-installed crewai package is a self-hosted Python agent framework (agents, tasks, Flows) you configure and run yourself, with CrewAI AMP/Enterprise at app.crewai.com as the optional hosted control plane.
